no-restricted-syntax.message: Direct-engine fetch detected. Per CSPM_CONSTITUTION §4.5 UI-Backend Contract, frontend may only call /gateway/api/v1/views/*, /gateway/api/v1/asset-context/*, /cspm/api/auth/*, or paths in ALLOWED_DIRECT_ENGINE_BYPASSES (see frontend/src/lib/allowed-bypasses.js). To add a new bypass, file an ADR signed by bmad-architect.
